accountCreated: Account created. Check your email to confirm, then sign in.
dataSync: Your data syncs securely to your account.

bgLocation.title: Background location
bgLocation.body: To record your run accurately, Running Coach collects your location in the background — including while the app is closed or the screen is off.
bgLocation.bulletRecording: Collected only while a run is recording — never at any other time.
bgLocation.bulletRoute: Used to draw your route and compute distance, pace, and elevation.
bgLocation.bulletStored: Stored in your own account; never sold or shared with third parties.
bgLocation.privacyNote: See our Privacy Policy. When you tap Allow, Android will ask to use your location — choose “Allow all the time” for screen-off tracking.
